# US-01: Bootstrap schema & domain scaffold

## User Story

As a **developer**,
I want to **establish the initial database schema and domain scaffolding**,
so that **other features can be implemented on a stable foundation**.

---

## Context

Create core domain artifacts and a minimal schema to support uploads, assets, and status tracking.

---
